name: NovaTech AX7 Pro Headphones
short_description: Next-gen ANC, 32hr battery, HyperComfort ear cushions
description: NovaTech AX7 Pro delivers studio-quality sound with an adaptive noise cancellation engine and 32-hour battery life. Dual-device pairing via HyperLink technology. Premium aluminium frame with memory foam cushions.

name: PixelBud Elite True Wireless Earbuds
short_description: AuraANC, spatial audio, IPX6, 6hr playback + 18hr case
description: Industry-first AuraANC technology blocks sound from all directions. Spatial audio with head tracking creates an immersive 3D soundscape. IPX6 water resistance and 6+18hr battery life.

name: VeloTrak Pro Wireless Mouse
short_description: 9200 DPI laser, MagWheel scroll, 80-day battery, 3-device connect
description: Peak productivity with VeloTrak's 9200 DPI precision laser sensor and MagWheel electromagnetic scroll. Three-device pairing, 80-day battery life, and a near-silent click mechanism for shared spaces.

name: SonicBlast X5 Portable Speaker
short_description: IP67, 22hr playtime, 360° BassBoost, dual USB-C charging
description: Room-filling 360° BassBoost sound with full IP67 protection. 22 hours of continuous playtime. Dual USB-C ports for pass-through charging. PartySync pairs up to 100 SonicBlast speakers.

name: OrbitHub Smart Speaker Mini
short_description: OrbitAI voice assistant, humidity + temp sensors, 2-inch woofer
description: Control your smart home with OrbitAI voice assistant. Built-in temperature and humidity sensors. 2-inch front-firing woofer delivers surprisingly rich sound for its size.

name: ChargePeak 70W Nano GaN Charger
short_description: GaN III, 4 ports, 70W total, SafeCharge protection
description: The world's smallest 70W 4-port charger powered by GaN III technology. Charge a laptop, tablet, and two phones simultaneously. SafeCharge protection prevents overcharging and overheating.

name: UrbanCraft Slim Fit Chinos
short_description: Stretch cotton blend, mid-rise, versatile smart-casual
description: Elevate your everyday look with UrbanCraft Slim Fit Chinos. Made from a premium stretch cotton blend for all-day comfort. Mid-rise cut suits both office and weekend occasions.

name: FlexStride Training Tee
short_description: AeroWick moisture management, relaxed fit, odour-resistant
description: Train harder with FlexStride AeroWick technology that pulls sweat away 2x faster than standard polyester. Anti-odour treatment lasts up to 50 washes. Relaxed fit allows full range of motion.

name: Meridian Slim Business Shirt
short_description: Easy-iron, slim cut, premium micro-weave, timeless colours
description: Built for the modern professional. Meridian's easy-iron micro-weave fabric keeps you crisp all day. Slim cut with structured collar — ready for boardroom to dinner.

name: VeloRun X3 Performance Running Shoes
short_description: CloudFlow cushioning, HyperMesh upper, energy-return midsole
description: Engineered for speed and comfort. CloudFlow full-length midsole absorbs impact and returns energy with every stride. HyperMesh upper adapts to your foot's natural shape.

name: NordBlend Relaxed Pullover Hoodie
short_description: Organic cotton interior, relaxed fit, ribbed cuffs and hem
description: Sustainable comfort in a relaxed silhouette. NordBlend hoodie is crafted with an organic cotton-blend interior for a soft luxurious feel. Ribbed cuffs and hem maintain shape after washing.

name: Vantage Executive Slim Blazer
short_description: Italian weave, padded shoulders, interior pockets, slim silhouette
description: Command every room with the Vantage Executive. Italian-inspired weave fabric with structured padded shoulders and a sharp slim silhouette. Interior chest and phone pockets.

name: The Compound Effect
short_description: Darren Hardy on multiplying your success through small daily choices
description: Small, seemingly insignificant steps completed consistently over time will create a radical difference. The Compound Effect is the strategy of reaping huge rewards from small, seemingly insignificant actions.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer (20th Anniversary)
short_description: David Thomas & Andrew Hunt's timeless guide to software craftsmanship
description: The 20th Anniversary Edition of the classic guide to software engineering. Updated with new content on agile, DevOps, and modern architecture. Required reading for every serious developer.

name: Rich Dad Poor Dad
short_description: Robert Kiyosaki on financial literacy, investing, and building wealth
description: The #1 personal finance book of all time tells the story of Robert Kiyosaki and his two dads — his real father and the father of his best friend — and the ways in which both men shaped his thoughts about money and investing.

name: Fundamentals of Software Architecture
short_description: Mark Richards & Neal Ford on architectural thinking and trade-offs
description: A comprehensive guide to software architecture covering architectural styles, decision-making, and the soft skills needed to be an effective architect. Covers microservices, event-driven, and layered architectures.

name: So Good They Can't Ignore You
short_description: Cal Newport challenges the passion hypothesis and redefines career success
description: Why do some people end up loving what they do, while so many others fail to find meaning in their work? Cal Newport argues that following your passion is terrible advice. Instead, build rare and valuable skills.

name: Grokking Algorithms (2nd Edition)
short_description: Illustrated, beginner-friendly guide to algorithms with Python examples
description: A fully illustrated, friendly guide that teaches you how to apply common algorithms to practical coding problems. Now updated for Python 3 with new chapters on machine learning algorithms.

name: CrispAir 4.5L Digital Air Fryer
short_description: TurboCirc technology, 4.5L, 10 presets, smart keep-warm mode
description: Cook healthier meals with up to 85% less oil using TurboCirc rapid air technology. 4.5L capacity ideal for family meals. Smart keep-warm mode maintains temperature for 30 minutes post-cook.

name: FlameMax 1200W Induction Cooktop
short_description: Crystal glass top, touch control, 8 power levels, auto-off
description: Sleek crystal glass surface with capacitive touch controls. 8 power levels from simmer to rapid boil. Child safety lock and automatic pan detection with 30-second timeout.

name: ThermoKeep Pro Flask 1L
short_description: 28hr hot / 28hr cold, vacuum insulated, wide mouth, spill-proof
description: Advanced double-wall vacuum insulation keeps beverages hot for 28 hours and cold for 28 hours. Wide mouth design for easy filling and cleaning. Spill-proof lid doubles as a drinking cup.

name: QuickBoil Pro Electric Kettle 1.7L
short_description: 1800W, 3.5-min boil, 5-temp control, keep-warm 30min
description: Boil 1.7L in just 3.5 minutes with QuickBoil's 1800W heating element. Five precise temperature settings for green tea, white tea, oolong, coffee, and full boil. 30-minute keep-warm function.

name: CleanPro Microfiber Cloth Set (15 pack)
short_description: 400 GSM ultra-dense, color-coded zones, 500-wash durability
description: Professional-grade 400 GSM microfiber cloths with colour-coded zones for kitchen, bathroom, and glass. Tested for 500 machine wash cycles. Ultra-fine fibres capture particles invisible to the naked eye.

name: SunrisePro 4-Slice Convection Toaster
short_description: 4-slice wide slots, 9 browning levels, bagel/muffin mode, auto-centering
description: Upgrade your breakfast game with the SunrisePro 4-Slice Convection Toaster. Wide slots accommodate artisan bread and bagels. 9 browning levels. Auto-centering guides ensure even toasting every time.

name: XSmash Pro Carbon Badminton Racket
short_description: Full carbon shaft, aerodynamic frame, even balance, attack-defense
description: The XSmash Pro Carbon racket provides the perfect balance between attack and defense with its isometric head and full-carbon shaft. Pre-strung at 22lbs with high-tension string for consistent performance.

name: IronFlex Power Loop Bands (6 bands)
short_description: 6 resistance levels, non-slip texture, heavy-duty latex, hip activation
description: Complete progression system with 6 resistance levels from 5lb to 60lb. Non-slip ribbed texture prevents rolling during squats and hip bridges. Heavy-duty natural latex construction rated for 10,000+ stretch cycles.

name: ZenFlow Premium Yoga Mat 8mm
short_description: 8mm thick, TPE eco-material, dual-layer grip, alignment lines printed
description: The ZenFlow Premium Mat is made from eco-friendly TPE — no PVC, no latex. 8mm thickness provides superior joint protection. Dual-layer construction prevents slipping even in hot yoga. Alignment lines help perfect your form.

name: Striker Pro Match Football Size 5
short_description: TPU outer, 32-panel machine stitched, butyl bladder, match-grade
description: Match-grade performance designed for grass and artificial turf. TPU outer skin provides superior abrasion resistance. 32-panel machine-stitched design for consistent flight. Butyl bladder retains air pressure longer.

name: TrailPace Comfort Walking Shoes
short_description: OrthoCloud insole, breathable mesh upper, 30km tested sole
description: Walk further, walk better. OrthoCloud orthopedic insole provides arch support and heel cushioning. Breathable mesh upper keeps feet cool for all-day wear. Outsole is lab-tested for 30km durability.

name: PowerGrip Hex Dumbbell Set 10kg
short_description: Hex rubber coating, ergonomic chrome grip, pair included, floor-safe
description: Non-roll hexagonal rubber coating protects floors and provides stability between sets. Ergonomic chrome-plated grip reduces hand fatigue. Pair of 5kg hex dumbbells — ideal starter set for home strength training.
